blueprint_stage: L3 hook — adjuster-facing AI Agent + Interface Layer

intended_use.primary: Replace GWCC desktop with AI co-pilot brief: 3-sentence claim summary, red flags, suggested actions, drafted comms, SLA clocks. Advisory only — adjuster makes all decisions.

training_approach: Rules + heuristics calibrated against POC closed-claim outcomes. ML uplift planned for v4. No demographic features used.

fairness.remediation_path: Threshold breach → bias_monitor flags → CCO + model owner notified within 24h → re-calibration job queued → HITL rate raised to 100% on flagged segment until resolved.

hitl_gates.always: Co-Pilot is advisory only — adjuster decides

human_oversight.override_logging: All adjuster overrides logged with overrideUserId, overrideReason, overrideTimestamp; feedback signal sent to model registry.

regulatory_alignment: NAIC Model Bulletin on AI (Dec 2023): §4 documentation, §5 monitoring
NIST AI RMF GOVERN-1.4: model risk profile

change_log.note: Governance Layer v1 — model card added; bias monitor wired where applicable
